name: sim_weyl_geometry_rescaling_shell
scope_note: Shell-local Weyl geometry conformal rescaling probe. Tests: angle preservation, length scaling, Christoffel changes, Clifford conformal factor, geomstats geodesics. z3 UNSAT: 2D Weyl tensor cannot be nonzero.

pytorch.reason: Represent metric as 2x2 positive definite tensor; compute angle between two vectors before and after conformal rescaling; verify cos(theta) is invariant via autograd on the metric inner product formula

pyg.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

z3.reason: UNSAT: encode the structural impossibility that a 2D metric has Weyl tensor != 0; in 2D W_{abcd} = 0 is a theorem — violation is impossible

cvc5.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

sympy.reason: Symbolic Christoffel symbols Gamma^k_{ij}; compute how Gamma changes under g -> Omega^2 * g; derive the Weyl connection correction terms Gamma -> Gamma + (delta terms involving d log Omega)

clifford.reason: Weyl rescaling in Cl(2,0): grade-0 scalar Omega acts as conformal factor on grade-1 vectors e_i -> Omega*e_i; verify inner product scales as Omega^2 while angle cos(theta) = (u.v)/(|u||v|) is preserved

geomstats.reason: Use Euclidean metric on R^2; compute geodesic distance before and after conformal rescaling (scaling all coordinates by Omega); verify distances scale by Omega but angle between tangent vectors is preserved

e3nn.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

rustworkx.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

xgi.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

toponetx.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

gudhi.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry shell-local probe; deferred to pairwise coupling

P1_pytorch_angle_invariant_under_rescali.reason: cos(theta) = g(u,v)/(|u||v|) unchanged under g -> Omega^2*g because Omega^2 cancels

P2_pytorch_lengths_scale_by_Omega_sq.reason: |v|^2 under g -> Omega^2*g scales by Omega^2 (here Omega=3, ratio=9)

P3_pytorch_length_ratios_preserved.reason: Length ratios |u|/|v| are preserved under conformal rescaling (Omega cancels)

P4_sympy_christoffel_changes_under_resca.reason: Gamma^1_11 for g=Omega^2*I equals d_x(log Omega), i.e., flat->rescaled adds d(log Omega) terms

P5_sympy_weyl_connection_correction_term.reason: Weyl connection correction delta_Gamma^1_{11} = d_x(log Omega); formula verified symbolically

P6_clifford_inner_product_scales_by_Omeg.reason: Cl(2,0) inner product of scaled vectors e_i -> Omega*e_i scales by Omega^2

P7_clifford_angle_preserved_under_scalin.reason: Clifford angle cos(theta) invariant under uniform grade-0 scalar rescaling

P8_geomstats_geodesic_distance_scales_wi.reason: Geodesic distance in Euclidean R^2 scales by Omega when all coordinates scale by Omega

P9_geomstats_tangent_angle_preserved_und.reason: Tangent angle (cos) unchanged under uniform Omega scaling of all vectors

N1_pytorch_lengths_NOT_preserved_under_r.reason: Conformal rescaling changes lengths; |v| -> Omega*|v| (not a length-preserving isometry)

N2_sympy_christoffels_change_not_invaria.reason: Christoffel symbols change under g -> Omega^2*g; they are NOT conformally invariant

N3_z3_unsat_2D_weyl_tensor_nonzero_impos.reason: UNSAT: encoding 'in_2D AND Weyl_nonzero' with theorem 'in_2D => weyl=0' is unsatisfiable; 2D Weyl tensor cannot be nonzero

N4_clifford_negative_omega_same_metric.reason: Omega=-1 satisfies Omega^2=1 so the rescaled metric is identical; NOT a distinct geometry

N5_geomstats_distances_differ_under_diff.reason: Different Omega values produce different geodesic distances; rescaling is NOT an isometry

B1_pytorch_omega_1_metric_unchanged.reason: At Omega=1, g -> 1^2*g = g; metric unchanged; Weyl connection = Levi-Civita

B2_sympy_omega_1_christoffel_correction_.reason: At Omega=1: d_x(log Omega) = d_x(0) = 0; Christoffel symbols unchanged (Weyl = Levi-Civita)

B3_pytorch_small_omega_angle_preserved_l.reason: Small Omega: angle preserved (conformal invariance) but lengths -> 0 (extreme contraction)

B4_clifford_omega_1_identity_rescaling.reason: At Omega=1, e1 -> 1*e1 = e1; Clifford inner product unchanged

B5_geomstats_omega_1_distance_unchanged.reason: At Omega=1, coordinate rescaling is identity; geodesic distance unchanged

B6_z3_sat_3D_weyl_can_be_zero.reason: SAT: in_3D AND weyl_3D_zero is consistent; 3D metrics CAN have zero Weyl tensor (unlike 4D)
